seo.title: Private Application | HeartLink
seo.description: Request a private invitation to HeartLink. Begin with verified LinkedIn and Instagram profiles rather than a traditional biodata sheet.

intro.title: Begin with who you are now.
intro.description: No lengthy biodata is required at this stage. A concise introduction and your established digital presence allow the private desk to begin a more human, contextual review.

form.introduction: Fields marked required are necessary to establish a secure verification dialogue. Your information is never added to a public directory.
form.verificationNote: Following HeartLink’s official digital channels and establishing a direct verification dialogue are required components of admission. This protects the integrity of the registry and ensures every applicant enters through a consistent, human-reviewed process.
form.consent: I confirm that these profiles are my own, consent to confidential review by the HeartLink private desk, and understand that submission does not guarantee an invitation.

faqs.question: Who will see my information?
faqs.answer: Your initial submission is reviewed only by HeartLink’s private admissions desk and its principals. It is not published, indexed or shared with prospective matches.

faqs.question: Why are social profiles required?
faqs.answer: Established professional and social profiles offer a lighter, more natural first layer of identity verification and context than demanding a long biodata document before a relationship with the firm exists.

faqs.question: What happens after submission?
faqs.answer: If the mandate appears aligned with our current registry and advisory capacity, the private desk will establish a direct verification dialogue before any invitation or commercial discussion.
